title: achillea millefolium var. tanacetifolia
intro: Achillea millefolium var. tanacetifolia, also known as Tansy, is a variety of the yarrow plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating digestive issues, skin problems, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Tansy include its ability to relieve symptoms of allergies, reduce fever, and prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Tansy can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used internally or externally to promote overall well-being.
